items.title: [正面] Solid game, I really enjoy it. Generous especially...
items.summary:
Solid game, I really enjoy it. Generous especially for a gacha, with the limited characters going into standard pools and on updates being able to reset undesired characters down to base form and being able to use their extra copies on another standard character.

Updated: 21/07/2025. 

They did an update and just made the translation much better, the text much cleaner, currently giving away masses of standard pulls. A great time to join the game if you missed the half Anni~

items.title: [正面] I am absolutely in love with this game. The aesthe...
items.summary:
I am absolutely in love with this game. The aesthetic is great. I love the characters and designs. It has a lot to do. I spend hours on it daily currently.

However, the translation could use some work. Characters gender in conversations is almost always incorrect. I am never sure if the word used is the correct one, or if it means what it's supposed to mean. While I think I have a pretty good grasp of the story, I do have to mentally translate the story at times. 

The other downside is it is a gacha. While optional, it can be really hard to get some of the better characters. You do get in game items to help get characters. You can earn these just by playing. While I decided to put a small bit of money into the game, you absolutely don't have to in order to get characters.
